summary: Diff adds a new fullscreen animation overlay and a centralized meditation animation mapping, and wires fullscreen state into App/MainPlayer. However, evidence is insufficient that the original Player “Animation” tab/section was fixed (as opposed to adding/replacing with a fullscreen overlay), and resize/orientation-change handling for true fullscreen coverage cannot be confirmed from the truncated overlay/visualization code.

missing_requirements.requirement: Fix the Player’s non-working “Animation” section/tab so it reliably renders while audio is playing, without causing runtime errors or blank screens; closing returns to player and audio continues.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows a new fullscreen overlay (PlayerAnimationOverlay) driven by VisualizationContext, but does not show any fix to an existing Player "Animation" tab/section or its routing/state. There is no evidence of a tab component being repaired, nor of the prior error/blank-screen cause being addressed.

missing_requirements.requirement: Fullscreen meditation animations are truly fullscreen, resize correctly on orientation changes, and remain visually comfortable (slow movement, low flicker, low contrast strain).
missing_requirements.reason: While canvas sizing is present (using bounding rect or window.innerWidth/innerHeight), the provided truncated diffs do not show any window resize/orientationchange event listeners or cleanup to ensure continuous correct resizing in fullscreen. Visual comfort constraints (anti-flicker/strobe guarantees) are implied by alpha fades but cannot be verified as enforced.

hallucinated_features.description: Persisting fullscreen visualization state to localStorage (FULLSCREEN_STORAGE_KEY) and adding defensive localStorage read/write logging for visualization state.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest does not ask to persist fullscreen state or add storage/logging behavior; it only asks to fix rendering and fullscreen behavior.

hallucinated_features.description: Adding/expanding translations structure to include visualizationExitHint across all supported languages.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-4 asks that visualization/animation UI text be English and routed through localization; it does not request adding a new translation key across every language (though it may support the requirement).
